title: Best House Reusable Plastic Bowls - 12 OZ, Washable Tableware and Dinnerware Plastic Bowl, White Plastic Bowls for BBQs, Party, Picnics, & Catering (Pack of 50 PCS)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: These Bowls made of reusable food grade plastic, BPA free, non-toxic and harmless, family rest assured to use, smooth burr free, comfortable to touch, heavy plastic structure, can prevent breaking, bending and breaking, enhance durability.
REUSABLE & WASHABLE: This washable plastic bowls you have to reuse & wash these white plastic bowls. Our serving bowls for parties can be used more than once if washed with some warm water and soap.

STRONG AND DURABLE: Our reusable plastic bowls are sturdy, durable, and can be used as a fruit, cereal, soup, and rice bowls. These plastic party bowls work great for holding cold and hot items without getting too hot.

REUSABLE BOWLS: Make your post-party cleanup quick and easier! To reduce your hassle, you can immediately dispose of these plates after the first use. Alternatively, you can hand-wash and reuse them to lessen your waste.
MULTI USE: Perfect for daily use or large catered gatherings or events, such as Birthday parties, Weddings, and banquets and every day use Home, Office.
